title: Edge functions in 2026 are cheaper than a coffee but only useful in 3 cases
meta_description: Cut API response time by 43% for SE Asia users with Cloudflare Workers, but added 34ms in the US — real latency, cost, and failure data from a live global API in 2026. edge functions when Cloudflare Workers and Vercel Edge actually make sense
